title: Micron (MU)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Micron using FY2025 financials. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what Micron is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-mprqfxda>
Memory cycles are notorious for boom and bust. However, the AI wave demands staggering amounts of HBM, where Micron has a yield and power efficiency advantage. This drives unprecedented revenue growth. 25% growth over 5 years is aggressive but warranted by the secular AI buildout.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)

" data-astro-cid-mprqfxda>

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).

faq.question: Why use DCF instead of P/E for a cyclical semiconductor stock?
faq.answer: Westmount Research. "Micron (MU) Intrinsic Value: A Two-Stage DCF Analysis." westmountfundamentals.com, March 18, 2026.
